title: Nickel gains despite looming wave of supply
section_path: Nickel gains despite looming wave of supply
section_path_text: Nickel gains despite looming wave of supply
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
Markets remained range bound as the post-FOMC rally petered out on a stronger USD. Doubts on the strength of China's reopening weighed on sentiment. Image reference: 1675373310984.png | assets/2023-02-03_nickel-gains-despite-looming-wave-of-supply_img_1675373310984_898a6f7f1877.png
Copper was up early in the session as part of the risk-on rally after the market perceived Chair Powell's comments following the FOMC meeting as dovish.
